case_title: BRENDA NG et al VS. DOES 1 TO 10, INCL.

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SAENZ, NUBIA CRUZ, NELSON SAENZ, RONALD
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NG, BRENDA KWAN, JOANNE LY, BERNICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SAENZ, NUBIA CRUZ, NELSON SAENZ, RONALD
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF NG, BRENDA KWAN, JOANNE LY, BERNICE

STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NG, BRENDA KWAN, JOANNE LY, BERNICE ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT SAENZ, NUBIA CRUZ, NELSON SAENZ, RONALD
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ENTERING JUDGMNT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NG, BRENDA KWAN, JOANNE LY, BERNICE
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NG, BRENDA KWAN, JOANNE LY, BERNICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAENZ, NUBIA CRUZ, NELSON SAENZ, RONALD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2907 FOLSOM STREET, SAN FRANCISCO $1,007.81 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,007.81, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
